data.name: Lockdown 2024
data.detailed_description:
Lockdown 2024 is a point-and-click adventure game with a linear storyline. It is about a young man (18) who’s lived a very sheltered life. His father and stepmother allowed no extracurricular activity, no internet, and no fraternizing with the opposite sex. A new strain of COVID-19 is discovered and the government has instituted a new lockdown. Our hero’s father passed away during the first pandemic and now he’s the only man in a house full of women. He will need to attend university (college) online, help the women around the house, and discover some secrets about his and his family’s past.

Features:

  • Over 11,000 images

  • 500+ Animations

  • All images rendered in 4k (3840x2160)

  • Engaging (skippable) mini-games; Lock picking, Fixing the pipes, Computer Hacking, Basketball

  • 3 Preset Options of play style to allow you to play as you want (can be fine-tuned in-game)

  • 50+ unlockable scenes

  • 23 separate locations to explore

  • Text translated into 9 additional languages (Machine Translation): French, Spanish, Russian, Italian, Portuguese (BR), Chinese (Simplified), Japanese, German, Hungarian.

The housemates

*Indicates a relationship that is customizable.

Your stepmom*, Devon, is the matriarch of the house. She’s very strict and sometimes overbearing.

Maria, your step-grandma*, is Devon’s mother. She’s kind and loving and serves as a teacher to our hero.

Amber, you stepsister*, is Devon’s eldest daughter. Amber is fashion conscious and more worldly than our hero. She’s also really mean.

Emma, your other stepsister*, is Amber’s younger sister. She’s sweet and innocent and is the same age as the main character.

Jasmin is friends with Amber. She’s sporty and very promiscuous.

Naomi is an exchange student and friends with Emma. She likes computers, cosplay, and other geeky stuff.

The live-in maid Isabella starts working in the house just as the outbreak begins.

data.short_description: A modern day point-n-click adventure game about a guy who spends a year with seven women locked down in a house due to COVID.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 匈牙利文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: SSE2 instruction set support
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: SSE2 instruction set support
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: SSE2 instruction set support
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: SSE2 instruction set support
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
